title: Textbox
main: This is a simple social media platform, in the style of twitter or Instagram, and implements the following functionality:
points: Create account / login
Create post and comment
Follow user
Custom homepage based on likes and follows.

title: Sherry
main: Sherry is a file sharing cloud storage platform in the style of google drive, and implements the following functionality:
points: Create account / login
Upload file
Organize files using folders and tags
Share files with specific users, or make them public
Search files

title: Folding@RHS
main: Folding@RHS is a project where old, often broken, school computers are restored and have their computing power donated to medical science via the Folding@home project.
points: Restored 14 computers.
Created a master computer to monitoring of all systems at once.
Created Bash scripts to automate the installation of key software.

title: DNART
main: DNART is an Electrical Art project that displays the strands of insulin and scrolls based on movement detected by a lidar rangefinder.
points: Wrote and debugged code for Microbit to ensure smooth movement and radio communication.
Worked with both Microbit (for initial testing) and Arduino (for final version).
Isolated and eliminated faulty wiring.

icons.alt: DNART screen fully lit up with lidar visible.

title: PestoFish2
main: Pestofish2 is an an advanced and optimized chess engine written in C++, that plays at grand master level.
points: Advanced search, featuring Negamax with Alpha-Beta pruning, quasiance, late move reduction and check extensions.
Efficient multithreading, using LazySMP.
An efficently updateable neural network for position evaluation.

icons.alt: Pestofish2 defeating a master level chess engine.

title: Flappy AI
main: A evolutionary algorithm that trains an AI to play Flappy Bird using an Evolutionary Algorithm. Built with the Godot Engine and C#.
points: Custom implementation of an evolutionary algorithm.
Real-time Training, which allows watching each generation progressively get better at the game.

title: Statblock-JSONify
main: This app can convert homebrewery markdown, as well as images of statblocks, into JSON usable by automated tools.
points: Searches and extracts stat blocks from Homebrewery markdown to JSON.
OCR to extract text from images and converts that to markdown.
